seo.title: Apex Demo Co — Modern Solutions for Growing Businesses
seo.description: Apex Demo Co helps small and mid-sized businesses scale with cutting-edge automation, consulting, and web solutions.

review_request.prompt_text: Enjoying our service? Leave us a review.

services.title: AI Process Automation
services.description: Eliminate repetitive manual work with intelligent automation workflows that integrate with your existing tools.

services.title: Custom Web Development
services.description: Performant, config-driven websites and web apps built on Next.js — from landing pages to full dashboards.

services.title: Data & Analytics
services.description: Turn raw business data into actionable insights with automated reporting pipelines and live dashboards.

services.title: CRM & Intake Automation
services.description: Connect your contact forms, CRM, and email into a single automated intake pipeline so no lead falls through.

services.title: Document Processing
services.description: OCR-powered extraction and structured output from PDFs, invoices, medical records, and more.

services.title: Chief AI Officer Consulting
services.description: Strategic AI roadmapping and implementation guidance for SMBs ready to operationalize artificial intelligence.

faq.question: How long does a typical automation project take?
faq.answer: Most Starter projects are delivered within 5–7 business days. Growth projects typically run 2–4 weeks depending on integration complexity and feedback cycles.

faq.question: Do I need to be technical to work with you?
faq.answer: Not at all. We handle everything technical and document all workflows in plain language so your team can understand and maintain them.

faq.question: What tools do you integrate with?
faq.answer: We integrate with virtually any tool that has an API or webhook — including HubSpot, Salesforce, Slack, Google Workspace, QuickBooks, and hundreds more via N8N.

faq.question: What happens if something breaks after delivery?
faq.answer: All packages include post-delivery support. Growth and Enterprise clients receive priority response within 4 business hours.

faq.question: Can you build on top of automations we already have?
faq.answer: Yes. We frequently audit and extend existing N8N, Zapier, or Make.com workflows rather than rebuilding from scratch — preserving your investment.

hero.headline: Automate the Routine. Focus on What Matters.
hero.subheadline: Apex Demo Co delivers AI-powered automations and custom web solutions that eliminate manual work and accelerate your growth.

cta_banner.headline: Ready to Eliminate Manual Work?

footer.tagline: Built for the businesses that run the world.
